allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('next:', p.dependencies.next, 'zod:', p.dependencies.zod, 'react:', p.dependencies.react\)")

Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); console.log\('zod version:', z.z?.version ?? 'check package'\); const {name, version} = require\('./node_modules/zod/package.json'\); console.log\(name, version\)")
